desc: Rotates selected elements 90° to stand up (horizontal to vertical: — to |).
summary: Rotates selected elements 90° to stand up (horizontal to vertical: — to |). Workflow: Select elements → Pick pivot point → Elements rotate 90° around X or Y axis. Uses Rotate3DToOrientation helper for the rotation, fitting deletion, recreation, and reconnection logic.
usecase: User wants to stand up horizontal pipes/elements to vertical orientation during modelling.
notfor: Rotating to arbitrary angles (not 90°). Mirroring elements. Rotating in plan view only.
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one element with geometry must be selectable.
postcondition: Selected elements are rotated 90° around the chosen pivot. Fittings are deleted and recreated.

successprompts: Done — elements are now standing up.
